description: Configuration values for the RHACS Manager Helm chart.

env.description: Database connection environment variables for the backend.

backup.description:
Barman Object Store backup configuration (hub mode only).
Requires a pre-existing secret with provider credentials.

inheritFromAzureAD.description: Use Azure AD Workload Identity instead of explicit credentials.
inheritFromAzureAD.title: inheritFromAzureAD

secretName.description: Name of the secret containing AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT and AZURE_STORAGE_KEY.
secretName.title: secretName

storageAccountKey.description: Key in the secret for the storage account name.
storageAccountKey.title: storageAccountKey

storageKeyKey.description: Key in the secret for the storage key.
storageKeyKey.title: storageKeyKey

destinationPath.description:
Backup destination path (e.g. s3://bucket/path, gs://bucket/path,
or https://<account>.blob.core.windows.net/<container>/<path>).
destinationPath.title: destinationPath

enabled.description: Enable continuous backup and WAL archiving to an object store.
enabled.title: enabled

applicationCredentialsKey.description: Key in the secret for the application credentials.
applicationCredentialsKey.title: applicationCredentialsKey

gkeEnvironment.description: Use GKE Workload Identity instead of explicit credentials.
gkeEnvironment.title: gkeEnvironment

secretName.description: Name of the secret containing a GCS service account JSON key.
secretName.title: secretName

retentionPolicy.description: Retention policy using recovery window semantics (e.g. "30d").
retentionPolicy.title: retentionPolicy

accessKeyIdKey.description: Key in the secret for the access key ID.
accessKeyIdKey.title: accessKeyIdKey

endpointCA.description: Secret reference for a custom CA certificate (optional).

name.title: name

endpointCA.title: endpointCA

endpointURL.description: Custom S3 endpoint URL for MinIO or other S3-compatible stores.
endpointURL.title: endpointURL

secretAccessKeyKey.description: Key in the secret for the secret access key.
secretAccessKeyKey.title: secretAccessKeyKey

secretName.description: Name of the secret containing ACCESS_KEY_ID and ACCESS_SECRET_KEY.
secretName.title: secretName

backupOwnerReference.description: Owner reference mode for backup objects.
backupOwnerReference.title: backupOwnerReference

immediate.description: Trigger an immediate backup when the ScheduledBackup is created.
immediate.title: immediate

schedule.description: Cron schedule in 6-field format (seconds included). Default: daily at midnight.
schedule.title: schedule

worker.description:
Worker deployment — runs scheduler jobs (single replica only).
Shares backend image, secret, and DB config. Do NOT increase replicaCount
above 1 — the in-memory scheduler has no leader election and duplicate
cron runs will cause duplicate emails and race conditions.

deploymentName.description: Name of the worker Deployment resource.
deploymentName.title: deploymentName

tag.description: Image tag. Defaults to Chart.appVersion if not set.
tag.title: tag

timeoutSeconds.description: Seconds before the probe times out.
timeoutSeconds.title: timeoutSeconds

livenessProbe.title: livenessProbe

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level security context for the worker.
podSecurityContext.title: podSecurityContext

replicaCount.description: Number of worker replicas. Must be 1 (no leader election).
replicaCount.title: replicaCount

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the worker container.
resources.title: resources

securityContext.description: Container-level security context for the worker.
securityContext.title: securityContext

startupProbe.description: Startup probe for the worker container.

timeoutSeconds.description: Seconds before the probe times out.
timeoutSeconds.title: timeoutSeconds

startupProbe.title: startupProbe
